title: Tom Lee's Bitmine slowed ether purchases as it bought back $86 million in stock
summary: The company added just 7,430 ETH, worth about $14 million, last week as it nears its goal to corner 5% of Ethereum's supply.

title: Saylor's Strategy raises cash reserves to $3.2 billion, leaving bitcoin holdings unchanged
summary: For the second consecutive week, the firm kept bitcoin holdings steady, choosing to use the raised capital to boost cash for paying dividends on its preferred stock.

title: Brazil’s securities regulator sets up task force with 60-day deadline for tokenization proposal
summary: The framework will address critical issues like official ownership records, private key custody, transaction reversibility and system liability.

title: A bitcoin 'volmageddon' may be brewing, key indicator suggests
Bank of Korea prepares for live CBDC transactions with 9 banks in September
summary: Major banking heavyweights join a massive blockchain network test that will allow retail consumers to trade tokenized won freely across commercial lines.
